hindi: अच्युतं केशवं रामनारायणं, कृष्णदामोदरं वासुदेवं हरिम्।
english: Achyuta, Keshava, Rama, Narayana, Krishna, Damodara, Vasudeva, Hari
roman: Achyutam Keshavam Rama Narayanam Krishna Damodara Vasudeva Harim

hindi: श्रीधरं माधवं गोपिकावल्लभं, जानकीनायकं रामचन्द्रं भजे॥
english: Shridhara, Madhava, beloved of the Gopis, lord of Janaki — I worship Ramachandra
roman: Shri dharam Madhavam Gopika vallabham Janaki nayakam Ramachandram bhaje

english: Remembrance of the names Achyuta, Ananta and Govinda
Destroys for the person the ocean of worldly existence
Krishna, Vishnu, Murari, Keshava, Kamalapati (lord of Lakshmi)

hindi: अच्युताष्टकमिदं पुण्यं यः पठेद् भक्तितः सदा।
english: Whoever reads this sacred Achyuta Ashtakam daily with devotion
roman: Achyuta ashtakam idam punyam yah pathed bhaktitah sada

hindi: वैकुण्ठं प्राप्नुयात् नित्यं विष्णोः साम्यं समाश्रयेत्॥
english: Always attains Vaikuntha and approaches the equality of Vishnu
roman: Vaikuntham prapnuyat nityam Vishnoh samyam samashrayet
